ns0:entry.ns0:title: Loyalsoldier/clash-rules
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Loyalsoldier/clash-rules
Language: unknown
🦄️ 🎃 👻 Clash Premium 规则集(RULE-SET)，兼容 ClashX Pro、Clash for Windows 等基于 Clash Premium 内核的客户端。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PicoTrex/Awesome-Nano-Banana-images
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PicoTrex/Awesome-Nano-Banana-images
Language: unknown
A curated collection of fun and creative examples generated with Nano Banana & Nano Banana Pro🍌, Gemini-2.5-flash-image based model. We also release Nano-consistent-150K openly to support the community's development of image generation and unified models(click to website to see our blog)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloudcommunity/Free-Certifications
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloudcommunity/Free-Certifications
Language: unknown
A curated list of free courses with certifications. Also available at https://free-certifications.com/

ns0:entry.ns0:title: enescingoz/awesome-n8n-templates
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/enescingoz/awesome-n8n-templates
Language: unknown
Supercharge your workflow automation with this curated collection of n8n templates! Instantly connect your favorite apps-like Gmail, Telegram, Google Drive, Slack, and more-with ready-to-use, AI-powered automations. Save time, boost productivity, and unlock the true potential of n8n in just a few clicks.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: farhanashrafdev/90DaysOfCyberSecurity
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/farhanashrafdev/90DaysOfCyberSecurity
Language: unknown
This repository contains a 90-day cybersecurity study plan, along with resources and materials for learning various cybersecurity concepts and technologies. The plan is organized into daily tasks, covering topics such as Network+, Security+, Linux, Python, Traffic Analysis, Git, ELK, AWS, Azure, and Hacking. The repository also includes a `LEARN.md

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mtdvio/every-programmer-should-know
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mtdvio/every-programmer-should-know
Language: unknown
A collection of (mostly) technical things every software developer should know about
